name: CPI Headline YoY %
notes: World Bank / ILO annual average CPI inflation. Annual tier-1 fallback for the monthly <C>_CPI_YOY columns (cadence-first means any monthly source wins by frequency; WB only fills countries with no monthly source). >2% = above DM central bank targets; >5% = high-inflation regime. Renamed CPI->CPI_YOY 2026-07-07 (CPI-definition split — see manuals/2026-06-18-cpi-split-codespace-spec.md).
